title: Recruits Corpse Patch
description: Recruit corpses now use matching skins and models.
body:
**This addon will not be updated for Recruits 1.15.1 and newer, as its fixes have been integrated directly into the main mod.**

Fixes the [Recruits](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) + [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse) compatibility.

Recruit corpses now use matching recruit skins and models instead of default player skins.

Works for both villager and human recruit variants.

Supports Recruits `1.11.2+` and Corpse `1.20.1-1.0.3+`.
